records.ety: [OE. nodil, nodle; perh. fr. nod, because the head is the nodding part of the body, or perh. akin to E. knot; cf. Prov. E. nod the nape of the neck.]

defs: The head; also, noodle; -- used jocosely or contemptuously.
quotes: Come, master, I have a project in my noddle.

defs: The back part of the head or neck.
quotes: For occasion . . . turneth a bald noddle, after she hath presented her locks in front, and no hold taken.
